title: Berry Frozen Delight
description: A light Slovakian dish featuring fresh mixed berries frozen to perfection, served as a delicious and keto-friendly dessert.

ingredients.name: Ketogenic Granola
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and texture

ingredients.name: Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a creamy base if needed

instructions: Freeze mixed berries in an ice cube tray or plastic bags until firm.
In a mixing bowl, combine frozen mixed berries with ketogenic granola and almond milk (if using).
Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into individual serving dishes or small bowls for easy handling.
Let it sit at room temperature for 10-15 minutes before enjoying, allowing the melted frozen berries to slightly soften but keeping the granola and almond milk solid as a base.
